programme.title: Defenders UK
programme.desc: Investigating cases of coach drivers who continue to drive while exhausted. Plus, new imaging technology used to discover if sheds are being illegally rented out as homes

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Nick Knowles presents footage of an angler fishing on a rock who is swept into a raging sea, and a mountain biker whose attempt at a stunt does not go according to plan

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams look for items at the Royal Highland Centre in Ingliston, Edinburgh, with help from experts Roo Irvine and David Harper. Natasha Raskin Sharp keeps an eye on proceedings and also finds a very special portrait

programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Escape to the Perfect Town
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin introduces a London couple to his home town of Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, taking them on a trip to the nearby Grand Union Canal and showcasing the local craft ales

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades enlists woodworking expert Ollie Allen to give a coffee table a makeover, while upcycler Jacqui Joseph breathes new life into a set of dining chairs

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Nigel Havers and valuation expert Simon Bower welcome four more people with interesting items they'd like to sell. Nigel then invites the dealers to bid against one another to secure a vintage fairground game, a 19th-century Chinese inkwell, a 1950s toy pedal car and a Victorian watchman's clock

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. Presented by Alexander Armstrong, with Richard Osman

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones brings you the stories that matter from across the country

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Money is tight for the Slaters so Kush sells Lily's tablet, but when Suki reminds him their rent is going up on Friday, he resorts to his online poker game yet again. After bumping into Honey on the way to her date, Billy tells Jay he's worried she may get hurt. Sharon tells Ian that Bobby has asked her and Max to be the foundation trustees

programme.title: The Sheriffs Are Coming: Compilation
programme.desc: Mike and Michael are forced to call the police when a confrontation at a Yorkshire car dealership turns ugly. Can they get the man who was sold a faulty car the money he is owed? Rob and Gerald are called to remove a group of squatters from a family business. The unwelcome guests have racked up thousands of pounds in utility bills leaving the owner out of pocket and the place a mess. Tommy goes in search of a debtor on the beautiful Welsh coast and it seems a boat removal will be the most likely outcome

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: Gail develops a new outlook on life, but must also face the consequences of her actions. Belle's life is thrown into further chaos when her sister moves in, but she also ends up providing David with the answers he seeks. However, deciding what to do next will require him to question what he really believes. Hannah spends her hen night troubled by indecision, until a chat with Gail sheds light on both their problems

programme.title: Spotlight
programme.desc: Investigations into social and political issues affecting Northern Ireland

programme.title: Rent Like a Boss
programme.desc: Estate agents help young people find the best rental properties on tiny budgets. The first episode features 25-year-old Dan from Wigan, who is looking to move to central Manchester, and 21-year-old Ciaran who lives at home in Belfast

programme.title: The Debate Continues
programme.desc: Shown exactly 70 years after it was first transmitted in 1950, this historic film documents the restoration of the House of Commons which was severely damaged by a bombing raid in May 1941. There is rare footage of King George VI delivering an address to both Houses of Parliament in Westminster Hall to mark the reopening of the restored House of Commons. First shown on the BBC Television Service on 28 October 1950.

programme.title: Clann a' Chogaidh Mhoir (Small Hands in a Big War)
programme.desc: A First World War story about an 11-year-old girl who gives an 18-year-old youth a white feather as a sign of cowardice, which encourages him to sign up to the Army. After he is sent to fight in France, she meets his blind grandmother, who is now completely alone, and then discovers that the boy has been killed in action

programme.title: Luther 500: An t-Stri Spioradail (The Battle for Souls)
programme.desc: In a journey that takes him from Rome, Germany and Geneva to the Outer Hebrides and across the island of Ireland, Alex O'Henley uncovers why the Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland became, to a large extent, Protestant while most of Ireland remained Catholic. He shows how Martin Luther's legacy still looms large over the Gaelic world

programme.desc: The documentary about the long-running bus route brings things up to date by looking at the service as it is today and following 24-year-old Sean Gallagher as he makes the journey from Arranmore Island to Glasgow. Singer Daniel O Donnell also shares his memories of using the bus

programme.title: Alleluia! (Spiritual Music & Verse)
programme.desc: Ian MacKinnon presents hymns, psalms and personal faith stories. Plus, the Glasgow Islay Trio sing Fulangas Chrìosd, James Graham performs Psalm 100, Gemma Steele explains the role her beliefs play in her life and Angela MacEachen reads from the Book of Proverbs

programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and studio discussion from a female perspective

programme.title: Judge Rinder

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Five people who are family or friends answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money. Quiz, hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Steve, Alex, Jane and Terry pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dan unwittingly puts Amelia in danger, Meena receives a surprise gift, and Nate is hopeful

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: A masked Scott bursts into the bistro and threatens everyone with a gun, while Steve breaks the news to Leanne that he's tried 10 more specialists but no one is willing to fight their corner. Elsewhere, Imran suggests to Alya they might have to sell Yasmeen's house to pay her legal fees

programme.title: Inside Animal A&E
programme.desc: A Jack Russell is taken by ambulance to the Hospital in London Victoria as its elderly owner is worried her pet is unable to control its bladder, while a Chihuahua is in theatre with Maria for a delicate knee operation. In Grimsby, a blind rescue husky is checked in for the day to have its diabetes monitored, and a stray cat is the 200th to be brought to the hospital in a year, but is in need of urgent treatment before the charity can find it a new home

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Scott orders Ray and his mates to hand over their cash, and when Alya runs a credit check on Yasmeen, she is shocked to see a series of unpaid loans against her name. Over dinner, Todd tries to belittle George, but he gives Grimshaw short shrift

programme.title: The Sister
programme.desc: Nathan Redman has spent years trying to atone for a terrible event from his past and is now a decade into his marriage, but one rainy evening he is surprised by an unwelcome visit by a figure from his old life. Murder mystery, starring Russell Tovey, Bertie Carvel and Amanda Root

programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: First Among Equals: The Laurie Cunningham Story
programme.desc: The remarkable career of the footballer who became the first Englishman to transfer to Real Madrid and the first black player to represent England in a competitive match. Cunningham inspired a generation of black youngsters before his untimely death at the age of 33 in 1989. Featuring contributions by Ron Atkinson, John Barnes, John Fashanu, Paul Ince and Ian Wright among others

programme.desc: The travelling chef ventures into Louisiana's state capital Baton Rouge to experience a unique American phenomenon - tailgating. programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Former EastEnder and The Bill bad cop Todd Carty guest stars in this festive special of the rural drama. He plays an old army pal of Lord Ashfordly who moves into the hall while the peer is sunning himself in Bermuda, claiming he's there to keep an eye on the place after rumours of a planned break-in. However, he arouses the police's suspicions when he becomes involved with a teenage tearaway who seems to think Christmas isn't so much about giving and receiving as taking without the owner's permission. Elsewhere in the village, Blaketon and Peggy go into competition with rival Santa's grottos, and Ventress has his nose put out of joint when his friends draw straws to see who'll invite him to Christmas dinner while his wife's in hospital

However, he arouses the police's suspicions when he becomes involved with a teenage tearaway who seems to think Christmas isn't so much about giving and receiving as taking without the owner's permission. Elsewhere in the village, Blaketon and Peggy go into competition with rival Santa's grottos, and Ventress has his nose put out of joint when his friends draw straws to see who'll invite him to Christmas dinner while his wife's in hospital

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid suffers temporary amnesia, but Jean is on hand to produce reminders of his antics at the annual Boy Scouts reunion. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Convicted murderer Henry Stoddard's release from prison coincides with a spate of vandalism, and locals presume he is responsible for the petty crime. Meanwhile, Peggy sees the chance to make some money when her birth certificate suggests she is related to Lord Ashfordly

programme.desc: Returning for a second attempt at the Hatton Garden safe deposit vault, the gang members, now led by Terry Perkins, set out to finish what they started. programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An American tourist's body is discovered in her hotel room, apparently dead from a heart attack - but a valuable Anglo-Saxon jewel she intended to donate to the Ashmolean Museum is missing and several interested parties are acting strangely. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Simon Callow, Roberta Taylor and Kenneth Cranham

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Local boy Barry Dyson is accused of a series of arson attacks - and his clandestine relationship with a former employer's daughter complicates his plea of innocence. Peggy's latest money-making scheme with old friend Denzil creates an eyesore, forcing Jack to use his artistic flair to rectify matters, before he and Blaketon resort to more drastic - and illegal - measures. Rural drama, starring Gwen Taylor and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy tries to keep the peace between Sam and Butch. Paddy is shocked to see his credit card bill and worries that he will not be able to pay it if Zoe lets him go

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah is not happy when Jack stays out all night. Tara tells Kim that she plans to divorce Alex. Ned goes to Oakwell Hall and sets fire to the stables

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Deirdre tells Ken it is obvious that Sue fancies him. Gail tries to make up with Alma. Mike assures Sally she still has a job, but he will need to lay off half the workforce

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike finds a buyer for his flats, Martin rows with Alma for putting the cafe on the market, and Judy tells Joyce that she might be pregnant

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott enter the world of botany to search for the killer of a retired teacher found dead shortly after smuggling a rare orchid out of Borneo. The discovery of two more bodies makes the detectives realise the murderer will stop at nothing to get hold of the coveted plant, and it seems the key to the mystery may lie in a Latin notebook. John Nettles and John Hopkins star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An American tourist's body is discovered in her hotel room, apparently dead from a heart attack - but a valuable Anglo-Saxon jewel she intended to donate to the Ashmolean Museum is missing and several interested parties are acting strangely. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Simon Callow, Roberta Taylor and Kenneth Cranham

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Michael Kitchen returns to the role of Christopher Foyle, senior intelligence officer for MI5, in the first of three films. Foyle is drawn into the world of corrupt Nazi businessmen when a university professor is found murdered in a London park. When it transpires the victim was working as a translator in Nuremberg, the detective realises there are powerful people trying to conceal secrets from the Second World War. Meanwhile, Sam (Honeysuckle Weeks) volunteers for a risky undercover job, despite being pregnant. Guest stars include John Mahoney (Frasier), Jaime Winstone (Mad Dogs) and Nigel Lindsay (Four Lions)

programme.title: Hatton Garden
programme.desc: When the Metropolitan Police discover the burglary after the long Easter weekend, the gang members already have a two-day lead on them. They are desperate to split up the stolen goods, but more delays frustrate them. However, they soon come to realise that it is not only the police who are chasing them - Brian Reader also wants his share

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The father of a missing schoolgirl demands action, angry that a six-month investigation has failed to uncover any leads. Morse ends up being assigned the case - and discovers some unpleasant truths about her family and teachers during the course of his inquiries. John Thaw stars as the Oxford detective, with Kevin Whately, Peter Woodthorpe, Peter McEnery, Elizabeth Hurley and Frances Tomelty

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.desc: Anne tells Curly she is glad Andy has gone, Tricia lords it over Samantha at the Rovers, and Jim pushes Bill to make up with Maureen

programme.desc: Maud wonders why Maureen has cooled towards Bill. Fiona is shocked when she goes for a date with Alan at an Italian restaurant. Alma tells Mike how Stephen humiliated her

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Biff frantically tries to revive Linda until an ambulance arrives. Kim tells Tara she caught Alex taking cocaine. Biff receives some tragic news at the hospital

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim tells Sophie she feels guilty about Linda's death. Biff confronts Kim and warns he is out to get her. The police reveal the results of Linda's post mortem to Biff and Ned

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Rob lands himself in trouble when he spends the night with Helen, getting Geoff to cover his shift - and matters grow complicated after it's revealed that the doctor's estranged husband made the complaint. When a truck careers into a couple's back garden following a routine MOT test Bernie struggles to remember if he changed the bald tyres, and a snooping journalist soon forces the muddled mechanic to flee

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid resolves to exercise a little discipline when Sally adopts a stray dog. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida is adamant she's not available for work when the employment agency gets in touch _ until she takes a call

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a member of Oxford University's examinations board is found dead, Morse deduces he must have overheard a conversation someone wanted to keep secret at all costs. However, his theory has one major flaw - the victim was deaf. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Barbara Flynn, Michael Gough, Clive Swift, Roger Lloyd Pack and Frederick Treves

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Becky becomes obsessed with Ashley. Anne invites her parents over to meet Curly. Mike discovers that Kbec have pulled out of all their contracts with other clients

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate crime and mayhem in the countryside as they take on a murder case in picturesque Fletcher's Cross. Undertaker Patrick Pennyman is found dead in his funeral parlour and the detectives suspect a possible link to the local spiritualist church. When another body turns up, the pressure to find the culprit redoubles. John Nettles, John Hopkins and Jane Wymark star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When a member of Oxford University's examinations board is found dead, Morse deduces he must have overheard a conversation someone wanted to keep secret at all costs. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An archaeologist's wife is murdered during an excavation in the Middle East. Fortunately, a vacationing Poirot - who shares with most great detectives an inability to go on holiday without stumbling over a body or two - is on hand to investigate. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Ron Berglas, Georgina Sowerby and Iain Mitchell

programme.title: Hatton Garden
programme.desc: What was supposed to be a sleepy Easter Bank holiday weekend in London's world-famous jewellery quarter is thrown into chaos, when Brian Reader leads a gang of career criminals in an attempt to carry out the daring task of breaking into the vault of the Hatton Garden Safe Deposit Company. Fact-based drama about the April 2015 heist, starring Timothy Spall, Kenneth Cranham, David Hayman and Alex Norton

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar helps a businessman who claims he is being ruined by an imposter. Classic adventures, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter uncover a plot to smuggle gold bars into the Middle East disguised as weights for an international strongman competition. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: With whole weeks missing from his life and evidence of actions that he simply cannot remember, Steed finds himself in an endless series of deja vu situations. In reality he is slowly being hypnotised and the aim is to mesmerise him into killing 'Mother'. Kate O'Mara guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur attends an Italian wedding as guest of honour, and when Terry is held hostage at a launderette, the conman decides to sell the story to the media. First episode of the comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A trusted informant tips Regan off about an upcoming robbery, but the gang involved kidnaps his daughter to blackmail him into taking no action. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar becomes the target of a paid assassin and has to whittle down a list of potential avengers to find out who wants him killed. Time appears to not be on his side after a female journalist friend is abducted. Roger Moore stars, with Suzanne Lloyd

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. First episode of the influential fantasy series, starring Michael Praed as Robin of Loxley, a simple villager who finds himself cast in the role of saviour of the common people. With Anthony Valentine and Nickolas Grace

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed and Tara follow a chain of couriers passing a sophisticated briefcase thought to be carrying a large payoff for an unidentified traitor within the government. Penelope Keith guest stars

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry agrees to protect an ex-convict who is being targeted by former partners wanting a share of money stolen during a bank heist. Meanwhile, Arthur resorts to devious tactics to obtain the location of the stashed loot first. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A series of robberies is committed on affluent couples travelling down a country lane, and it transpires two of the suspected offenders are wealthy themselves. Lesley-Anne Down guest stars alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special

However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brother's funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges' thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne

programme.title: Minder

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A crooked foreign diplomat helps arrange the theft of a consignment of silver bullion being transported through Tilbury docks. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad foils the hijacking of a security truck before attempting to learn the identity of an informer. Colin Welland guest stars in the hard-hitting police drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Cycling: La Vuelta a Espana Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from stage seven, which featured a hilly 160.4km route from Vitoria Gasteiz to Valdegovia. Gary Imlach presents, with Daniel Friebe reporting and Ned Boulting and David Millar on commentary

programme.title: GoldenEye (1995)
programme.desc: James Bond heads for Russia to investigate the connection between the theft of an experimental helicopter and an orbital satellite weapon with the power to devastate entire cities. He discovers both have fallen into the hands of a mysterious criminal mastermind with a grudge against Britain and a connection with 007's past. Spy adventure, with Pierce Brosnan taking on his first assignment as 007. Sean Bean, Izabella Scorupco and Famke Janssen also star. Directed by Martin Campbell, who later helmed Daniel Craig's first outing as Bond, Casino Royale

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar finds a suspicious building in Wales which is being used as a research laboratory, plunging him into the midst of a spine-chilling adventure. Spy drama, directed by and starring Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin saves a witch's life and accepts Marion fully into the band of outlaws. Fantasy drama, starring Michael Praed

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: The world teeters on the brink of war as an ingenious mastermind manages to frame Miss King to look like a traitor as part of his plan to trigger a major conflict. Classic fantasy spy drama, starring Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry acts as the bodyguard for a Lebanese businessman and diplomat. However, relationships between the two are strained and when their safe house is raided by gunmen, Terry's opinion of his charge reaches a new depth. Dennis Waterman and Kenneth Griffith star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Cycling: La Vuelta a Espana Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from stage eight, which featured a mountainous 164.5km route from Logrono to Alto de Moncalvillo. Gary Imlach presents, with Daniel Friebe reporting and Ned Boulting and David Millar on commentary

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Emmerdale actor Tony Audenshaw (Bob Hope), former gymnast Beth Tweddle, 2010 Strictly Come Dancing champion Kara Tointon and X Factor judge Louis Walsh compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: First Among Equals: The Laurie Cunningham Story
programme.desc: The remarkable career of the footballer who became the first Englishman to transfer to Real Madrid and the first black player to represent England in a competitive match. Cunningham inspired a generation of black youngsters before his untimely death at the age of 33 in 1989. Featuring contributions by Ron Atkinson, John Barnes, John Fashanu, Paul Ince and Ian Wright among others

programme.title: Battleship (2012)
programme.desc: A reckless slacker joins the Navy, hoping to win the respect of his girlfriend's father, a stern admiral. He and his shipmates are put to the ultimate test as part of a force of vessels that must battle an invading fleet of powerful alien spaceships. Sci-fi adventure, starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard

When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Cycling: La Vuelta a Espana Highlights 2020
programme.desc: Action from stage eight, which featured a mountainous 164.5km route from Logrono to Alto de Moncalvillo. Gary Imlach presents, with Daniel Friebe reporting and Ned Boulting and David Millar on commentary

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Emmerdale actor Tony Audenshaw (Bob Hope), former gymnast Beth Tweddle, 2010 Strictly Come Dancing champion Kara Tointon and X Factor judge Louis Walsh compete to win thousands of pounds for charity by taking on one of the show's resident trivia experts in a test of their general knowledge. However, they must work as a team to build their prize pot and stay one step ahead of the Chaser. Bradley Walsh hosts

programme.title: First Among Equals: The Laurie Cunningham Story
programme.desc: The remarkable career of the footballer who became the first Englishman to transfer to Real Madrid and the first black player to represent England in a competitive match. Cunningham inspired a generation of black youngsters before his untimely death at the age of 33 in 1989. Featuring contributions by Ron Atkinson, John Barnes, John Fashanu, Paul Ince and Ian Wright among others

programme.title: Battleship (2012)
programme.desc: A reckless slacker joins the Navy, hoping to win the respect of his girlfriend's father, a stern admiral. He and his shipmates are put to the ultimate test as part of a force of vessels that must battle an invading fleet of powerful alien spaceships. Sci-fi adventure, starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Busy observing the sky in search of UFOs, Magoo accidentally finds himself wandering over to Fizz's house.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo, hunting for Pinkbeard's treasure, mistakes the park for an island. Fizz and Weasel are there, selling ice cream that never falls on the ground.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo has decided to go mountain climbing but in reality, he is climbing up a skyscraper! He mixes Fizz up with a wounded bird and ruins his plan

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is peeling off old wallpaper on Linda's walls, but he is actually destroying Fizz' hypnotic posters.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo finds himself shrunk and then dragged inside the President's head, along with Fizz. He thinks the hamster is a little, lost boy and decides to help him.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is on a camping trip but he is actually just in the city park. He mistakes Weasel for a wounded bear and tries to help him.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is thinks is out trick-or-treating for Halloween. But he unwittingly robs a bank instead of Weasel.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is a part-time firefighter reservist whose rescue mission for the day is to save a cat in a tree. In reality, the cat is none other than Fizz.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Thinking he is in the middle of a work-out at his local gym, Magoo inadvertently climbs onto a delivery boy's bicycle.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that Fizz is a hat he is going to wear for his romantic date with Marnie. That's bad enough, but Fizz has a very important job to do!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: At the supermarket, Magoo mixes his shopping cart up with a baby stroller. Fizz decides to save the toddler and become a media star.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks Weasel has opened a restaurant, and wants to help him improve it. He mistakes the FizzLab for a kitchen!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: When Magoo treats Mr Cat to a parachute jump, the two friends land on the top of the AeroFizz. Mr Magoo mistakes it for a desert island!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo mistakes Weasel (in an animal costume) for a groundhog being hunted, and confiscates the hunter's gun.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz is at the pool, he wants to start sub-marine hairdressing! But Magoo, thinks he is fishing in a lake, and starts trying to catch Weasel.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is handing out food to the neighbourhood animals when he stumbles on a gigantic hamster that Fizz has released from some parallel dimension.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo can't find the book that Linda lent him and he's ready to turn the house upside down to find it. The problem is that he's actually in Fizz's loft.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo, thinking he's at the laundromat, wanders into a candy factory, where Fizz and Weasel are creating a bubblegum that makes Fizz-shaped bubbles.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Thinking he's hunting down a rat in his attic, Magoo finds himself on the theme park, devoted to... the glory of Fizz.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo comes across Fizz encased in ice and thinks he has found a prehistoric man. He thaws him out and acts like a caveman, so as not to distress him.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he's helping out at an understaffed veterinary clinic. In fact, he's at the supermarket, where Fizz is trying to sell his cleaning products.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: In order to make himself an object of worship, Fizz makes people believe he's an alien coming to share his wisdom.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that the whole neighbourhood has been flooded, when in fact he is just at the local swimming pool.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo, on a construction site, thinks he's been hired for a medieval theatre show. Fizz and Weasel bump into Magoo at the top of the tower.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo is babysitting the Neighbours' toddler. The baby flees and kidnaps Fizz mistaking him for a plush toy.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz has invented a machine which stops toast from landing butter-side down. Magoo sees some floating toast and believes a ghost is haunting their house.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he is on a beach and that sailors are emptying their oil tanker right into the ocean.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz, controlling a robot, distributes ice cream to everyone in the city. When Magoo mistakes him for a monster, he gets sprayed with ice cream.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is at the foot of a volcano, but in fact, he's next to a huge soup vat. And he sets it all awry.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz invents a cucumber that turns people into an object of worship. When Magoo sees people being drawn to Fizz and Weasel, he thinks it's zombies!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is auditioning for a circus troop, but he is actually in a professional wrestling ring, in the middle of a fight!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he is in the subway but actually, he's in a cave. Running into Weasel, he thinks he's lost and decides to help him find his way.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz has reduced the size of the moon in order to model it in his own image. But Magoo thinks it's a dinosaur egg ready to hatch!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo mistakes some kids at the park for gnomes in a magic forest. Fizz uses a remote to immobilise them, to win over their parents!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz plans on replacing the statue from an Oscar-like ceremony with a statue in his effigy. But Magoo grabs it, thinking it's for sale in a store!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he's herding cattle through the desert, but is in fact on an ice floe with walruses. He takes Fizz and Weasel for cattle rustlers!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he is housesitting for Weasel. When he sees him returning from the grocery store with Fizz, he thinks they're burglars!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz and Weasel are at the supermarket buying ingredients to make the world's best cake. They bump into Magoo, who thinks he's at a carnival!

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks that he is lost in a pyramid but he is in fact in a big conference room where Fizz is about to perform a stand-up act.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz has dressed Weasel up as a supervillain in order to pretend to save the city. Magoo mistakes his disguised neighbour for an actress in danger.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Weasel accidentally launches Fizz next to Magoo. The latter, believing he is driving through a wildlife reserve, mistakes Fizz for a lost child.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he's underwater scooting and has discovered Atlantis. In fact, he's in New York, riding Fizz's latest invention.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz and Weasel are trying to steal the president's jokebook. Magoo, thinking he is visiting a museum of sorcery, mistakes Weasel for a wizard.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz has invented a hoverboard. After a slip-up, the board ends up in the hands of Magoo, who thinks he has found a new ironing board.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz falls into the sewers, only to bump into Magoo, who thinks he's exploring the jungle. The latter mistakes Fizz for a lost child.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: In the desert, Fizz and Weasel plan a fireworks display for Fizz. Mountain Rescuer Magoo mistakes Weasel for a skier in distress.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: In the forest, Magoo sets up camp by the rare fruit patch, giving a warm welcome to a bear that he has mistaken for a wayward hiker.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo thinks he's a beach lifeguard but is actually on an ice floe and the swimmers are penguins.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz and Weasel are after the president's jokebook. But Magoo, thinking he's in his dojo, enters the high-security unit where it's kept...

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo's going to miss his flight. Unfortunately, he's not at the airport, but the supermarket, where Fizz and Weasel are hatching their latest plan.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Fizz is at the beach building a sandcastle. Magoo thinks they are preparing to thwart an attack by an enemy riding a dragon.

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Weasel tries for his AeroFizz pilot's license. Magoo ruins everything when, convinced he's fixing his roof, he pierces a hole in the airship.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Rod and Margaret from London search for a house in Dorset and a holiday home in Dordogne in France, with enough space for their six grandchildren to come and visit

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Budding interior designer Cora and builder Jonny buy a house in the Lancashire town of Kirkham at auction and then have six months to renovate it before trying to sell it for a profit. Simon O'Brien presents

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at My Way Guest House in Broompark, Co Durham, where Kaye Horner and her daughter Lily are counting on their cleanliness to gain top marks

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer James hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from Edinburgh, hoping to impress guests Aisling, Bruce and Katy with a spicy Mexican menu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to get the Olympic Games to come to Springfield, but Bart ruins her efforts with an ill-judged stand-up routine. As punishment, he is forced to undertake community service at Grampa's retirement home, where he discovers the OAPs are desperate to feel young again

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Warren is suspicious of Sienna and Brody, while Maxine encourages Damon to follow his heart, and Kurt makes his intentions very clear with a proposition for his oldest friends

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Britain's service industry is battling for customers, but the public need to be convinced the big names are doing all they can to limit risk to exposure. Many hotel chains, transport companies, restaurants and pubs are making big promises of 'deep cleans' and ''enhanced hygiene practices', but with the resurgence of Covid-19, Morland Sanders puts them to test and asks just how safe is it when we go out. Government public health guidance says regular cleaning of surfaces plays a vital role in limiting the transmission of Covid-19 in public settings. In a national experiment, the programme tests the cleanliness of the surfaces people might encounter on a commute, or going for a drink, a meal or a mini staycation? It also examines emerging research concerning airborne transmission of Covid, as well as meeting people whose wellbeing is reliant on the hygiene standards of the service industry

programme.title: Food Unwrapped Investigates
programme.desc: Kate Quilton uncovers the truth behind some of Britain's most shocking food headlines, meeting the case studies behind the stories as well as exploring the science, conducting experiments and questioning those in control. She begins by investigating the world of severe food allergies, enlisting the help of a team of sufferers to report undercover at a host of different London eateries to see how they are treated

programme.title: President Trump: Tweets from the White House
programme.desc: Donald Trump has tweeted tens of thousands of times since becoming US president, giving the American people unique access to his innermost, unedited thoughts, and giving him access to his base without the interference of the traditional media. This programme looks at the impact on US politics of his use of Twitter, and whether they have caused problems and controversies, or, seemingly, solved intractable foreign policy problems

programme.title: Adult Material
programme.desc: Stella goes head to head with Jolene's former employers as her day in court arrives and she is finally forced to confront her past, while Carroll attempts to salvage his friendship with Jolene as loyalties are ruptured. Meanwhile, when the lost tape and her test results go public, Amy is forced to leave porn and begins escorting

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: The strand returns with a collection of new films from black film-makers, beginning with Anne Fearon's Motherhood

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets more tricky, puzzling and downright idiotic challenges for the celebrities, before Greg Davies decides who deserves the most points. Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The Covid-19 pandemic sets in just as the couples prepare to move in together, putting an unprecedented additional strain on their fledgling relationships. As measures ease, Owen and Michelle face a heartbreaking dilemma, while David and Shareen come together to enjoy a romantic glamping getaway

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Newcomers GB Para Powerlifter Ross and wellness coach Susie must make a dramatic decision about which of their teammates loses their place in camp. With one less person in the team, tempers fray and the bridge build falls even further behind schedule. A flare brings the promise of a luxury banquet, but with it the cost of an essential day of building, which causes a major rift

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by series fans Joel Dommett and Vick Hope, as they tuck into the best bits and unseen extras from Pastry Week. Regular contributor Tom Allen probes a bunch of home bakers and Jo showcases the incredible and inedible creations emerging from your kitchens at home. Plus, exclusive unseen clips from the tent and an interview with the latest baker to leave the competition

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Sonal and Tina can't wait to give up their busy lives in Birmingham and move to the seaside. Looking for a new permanent home on the stunning Gower Peninsula in Wales and also a holiday bolt-hole on the Greek island of Corfu, they call upon the joint talents of Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton to deliver the double dream. Rising to the challenge, with £385,000 to play with, Jonnie has three great properties to show them in the UK, and for her £150,000 budget Laura has three options up her sleeve in Corfu, but will the couple love any of them enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: Hair Power: Me and My Afro
programme.desc: Academic Emma Dabiri presents a documentary about the importance of afro-textured hair in black British history and culture. Black people from across the country share their personal experiences, discussing how what they do with their hair has been a rite of passage, a source of empowerment, or a focus of otherness and rejection

Meanwhile, Shannen hopes to find someone to share love and laugher with again after losing her husband to cancer. She meets fellow northerner Daniel, and the pair bond over beer and stories of times spent in Benidorm

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and his family enter the twilight zone in three more cartoon tales of horror, including the discovery of Bart's demented twin in the attic and Lisa being the god to an alternative human species cultured in a margarine tub. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is prescribed a marijuana-based medication to help him cope with the psychological after-effects of being attacked by crows and quickly becomes the life and soul of the party wherever he goes, leading Mr Burns to promote him for being so cheerful. Featuring the guest voices of rock band Phish

programme.title: Hamid (2019)
programme.desc: Director Aijaz Khan's story of redemption set against the backdrop of the political unrest and conflict in Kashmir. After eight-year-old Hamid's father goes missing, the young boy is rejected by his grief-stricken mother and finds himself increasingly isolated. Forced to seek answers for himself, he dials 'God's number' - 786 - into a phone and finds himself connected to a voice he believes to be the Almighty. But really he is speaking to a hard-nosed soldier fighting insurgents on the frontline in Kashmir. Drama, starring Vikas Kumar, Talha Arshad Reshi and Rasika Dugal. In Urdu and Hindi

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the incoming seasonal changes. This time, the wildlife park takes delivery of their brand-new insectivore, an anteater, and with mating season beginning, Nero the stud ram is introduced to his ewes. Elsewhere, Jimmy gets to grips with this autumn's piglets

programme.title: Damilola: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A poignant and reflective documentary marking the 20th anniversary of 10-year-old Damilola Taylor's violent murder on a North Peckham Estate in south London, presented by the radio presenter, writer and former resident of the estate Yinka Bokinni, who was a childhood friend of Damilola. Throughout the film, Yinka attempts to reconcile the two versions of her past and try to understand how the warm and loving community she remembers so fondly from her childhood was presented in the media as a notorious, crime-ridden estate that was somehow to blame for the tragic loss of a young life

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at a host of classic dates from the show, where eyes met, sparks flew, and love truly blossomed. Dapper gent Will is set up on a date with fellow tweed admirer Fran, while Bristol Rastafarian and single mother Ibiba meets fellow Bristolian Aarron. Elsewhere, Octogenarian Doreen meets 86-year-old author James, who is more than ready to write the next chapter of his love life

programme.title: Random Acts
programme.desc: A collection of exciting new films from cutting-edge black filmmakers, this time featuring Rikki Henry's short film Venus/Mars

programme.title: Sing It Loud: Black and Proud
programme.desc: From the legendary Ronnie Scott's venue, Maya Jama presents a one-off celebration for Black History Month, with some of the UK's finest gifted young jazz musicians. Zara McFarlane, Ashley Henry, Poppy Ajudha, Reuben James and Ayanna Witter-Johnson all take to stage to perform their own interpretations of iconic black protest anthems from Nina Simone, Stevie Wonder, Billie Holiday, Marvin Gaye and James Brown

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe are among the famous faces hitting the couch, joining Britain's favourite opinionated viewers as part of this year's Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Also taking part are Line of Duty's Adrian Dunbar, Vicky McClure and Martin Compston, KSI and Craig David, David Mitchell and Victoria Coren Mitchell, and Roger Daltrey and John Bishop. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchester mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.desc: Aspiring painter Margaret Keane marries a controlling man who sells her artwork. As the paintings of large-eyed children grow tremendously popular, Margaret discovers he is claiming to have painted them himself, and she and her daughter are forced to live a lie for years - until she finally resolves to prove his deceit in court. Tim Burton's fact-based drama, starring Amy Adams, Christoph Waltz and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Building the Ultimate
programme.desc: A look at the engineering secrets of the Antonov 124 Ruslan cargo aircraft, revealing how it transports the bulkiest, heaviest freight thousands of miles to any point on the planet. From its mega-tough skeleton forged from strong but super-light metal, to its four thrust-boosting engines, the programme reveals the technologies that make it the ultimate cargo plane

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The pursuit of a lights-out and dangerous teenage car thief, who is rallying around the roads of Wakefield at 90 miles an hour, is priority number one. One step ahead are interceptors Adie and Sophie, who are lying in wait ready to burst the driver's bubble, and his tyres, with a stinger. In Seacroft, Chris and Chris go into overdrive when a high-performance motor tries to give them the slip and, after cornering a dodgy Audi, the team are forced to stretch their legs to collar the driver

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The return of the documentary going behind the scenes at the London station. It is the height of summer and staff and passengers on the Western network are feeling the heat, with Network Rail staff positioned at key points to monitor the track - which can reach temperatures up to 20C higher than the air temperature

programme.title: London Has Fallen (2016)
programme.desc: World leaders gather in London for the funeral of the British Prime Minister, unaware they have been led into a trap. A terrorist plans to kill them all, and devastate the city, and the only people in a position to stop him are the President of the United States and the indomitable head of his secret service. Action thriller sequel to Olympus Has Fallen, starring Gerard Butler, Aaron Eckhart and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: The Secret Life of Puppies
programme.desc: A labrador puppy gets training as an assistance dog, learning how to set up a wheelchair, press an automatic door button and unload a washing machine - but the hardest challenge may be resisting a biscuit. A group of tamaskan puppies enjoys a canoeing holiday on the waterways of East Anglia, two silken wolfhounds are put to the test in a race, and a weimaraner starts work as a therapy dog

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: The owner of the famous farm in the middle of the M62 fears his cows have TB - and if even a single animal is diagnosed, it could prove disastrous for the rest of the herd. Julian rushes to the Taylors' farm to treat a sheep that has prolapsed days after giving birth, an eight-week-old shih tzu puppy needs surgery for a hernia, and Peter and Matt work together to castrate a goat

programme.title: Escape to the Farm with Kate Humble
programme.desc: The cows are ready to give birth, but one struggles to deliver after having been stepped on by a weighty heifer. Kate pays a visit to a butcher to learn how to humanely kill pigs and carefully prepare the meat so nothing goes to waste. Back in the farmhouse, she whips up a simple pasta dish

programme.title: ABBA: In Their Own Words
programme.desc: A celebration of the Swedish supergroup. Original interviews, rare archive footage and a lot of music, re-tells the story of one of the most successful pop groups of all time. Contributors include original studio engineer Michael Tretow, costume designer Owe Sandström, singer-songwriter Neil Sedaka, singers Donny Osmond and Barbara Dickson, Pete Waterman, Paul Gambaccini, tour manager Thomas Johansson and lyricist Tim Rice. Plus, Agnetha Fältskog, Anni-Frid Lyngstad, Björn Ulvaeus and Benny Andersson provide surprising insights

programme.title: The Estate: Life Up North
programme.desc: Documentary about life in the town of Washington, Tyne and Wear, following the lives, hopes and dreams of its residents over the course of six months. In the first edition, business is booming for 38-year-old fitness guru and entrepreneur Jonny, but after complaints about noise and parking issues, his gym has been threatened with closure

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris embarks on a thousand-mile trip along Spain's complex rail system, beginning in Gibraltar by exploring the vast network of military tunnels that have helped keep it under British control for more than 200 years. In Catalunya, he learns the role played by the railways in some of the bloodiest battles of the Spanish Civil War, then visits the spot where Hitler and Franco met during the Second World War

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: The tower staff prepares to reopen to paying visitors after lockdown results in the longest closure in 75 years, beginning with a special ceremonial lowering of the drawbridge. The ravenmaster makes sure his birds are ready to interact with members of the public after months in isolation, while the chief curator oversees the launch of a gruesome new attraction commemorating the executions on Tower Hill

programme.title: Henry VIII: Rise of a Tyrant
programme.desc: The series concludes with a look at the king's final years, when the pain caused by an infected ulcer on his leg had a detrimental impact on his increasingly angry temperament. Lauren Johnson examines the king's exotic diet, including meat from porpoises and seals, and considers its impact on both his weight and his health. Plus, a look at a Catholic rebellion and the breakdown of Henry's relationship with advisor Thomas Cromwell

programme.title: Philpott: 5 Mistakes That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: The errors made by Mick Philpott that led to his arrest for causing the death of five of his children and their half-brother by setting light to his home in Derby. The programme examines how his unconvincing appearance at a press conference and ill-timed attendance of a karaoke party raised the police's suspicions - leading them to bug his hotel room and hear an incriminating conversation

programme.title: The Murder of Sally Anne Bowman: 15 Years On
programme.desc: Looking back at the high-profile case of Sally Anne Bowman's murder in 2005, the 18-year-old woman who was attacked on the doorstep of her home in London. The programme reexamines the eventual arrest of Mark Dixie, who was finally found guilty of the crime and given life imprisonment three years after her death in 2008

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. In the first edition, a 34-year-old man is brought in after having punched his arm through a pub window. Handcuffed and accompanied by four police officers, his behaviour has medical staff fearing for the wellbeing of other patients. Matron Kat Henry deals with a flirtatious patient who has cut his head after a night out on the town and is determined to leave the hospital without treatment

programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of photographer Martin Roe, who was due to testify at an army first lieutenant's court-martial after he captured a picture of what appeared to be a soldier killing an unarmed civilian. However, the photograph is leaked, and Roe is later found dead with a needle in his arm

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: House Doctor

Sweeping out the mishmash of styles and loud colours, she introduces a calmer range of warm neutral shades, unifying the interior by laying laminate flooring and creating a separate dining area

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Three deaf people discuss how joining deaf sports teams changed their lives

programme.title: The Naked Jungle (1954)
programme.desc: A tough South American cocoa plantation owner and his newly arrived mail-order bride are menaced by a huge column of ferocious killer ants destroying everything in their path. Thriller, starring Charlton Heston, Eleanor Parker and William Conrad

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: The Last Frontier (1955)
programme.desc: A backwoods trapper signs up as a cavalry scout at a fort manned by inexperienced soldiers, where he falls in love with a colonel's wife. On taking over command of the garrison, the officer plans to lead his men in a reckless attack on a hostile Indian tribe - and it is down to the frontiersman to save his comrades from a massacre. Western, starring Victor Mature, Robert Preston and Anne Bancroft

programme.title: Carry On Cabby (1963)
programme.desc: The neglected wife of a workaholic taxi owner grows increasingly tired of his lack of interest in their marriage. In a ploy to bring him to his senses, she secretly launches a rival cab firm with a driver roster made up of attractive women, who soon tempt his customers away. Comedy, starring Sid James, Hattie Jacques, Kenneth Connor and Charles Hawtrey

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning

programme.title: A Quiet Place (2018)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with hypersensitive hearing. Horror, starring Emily Blunt and John Krasinski, who also directed

programme.title: The Strangers: Prey at Night (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after events of the first film, in a secluded Ohio trailer park, three masked strangers, Dollface, Pin-Up Girl, and the Man in the Mask, terrorise a family. Slasher horror sequel, starring Bailee Madison, Lewis Pullman and Christina Hendricks

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway (2018)
programme.desc: In the autumn of 1960, Father Thomas Riley and Father John Thornton are sent by the Vatican to investigate a miraculous event in an Irish home for 'fallen women', only to uncover something much more terrifying. Horror, starring Lalor Roddy, Ciaran Flynn and Helena Bereen

programme.title: Pyewacket (2017)
programme.desc: An angst-ridden teenage girl awakens something in the woods when she naively performs an occult ritual to kill her mother. Horror, starring Nicole Munoz, Laurie Holden and Chloe Rose

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate

programme.title: The File on Thelma Jordon (1950)
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney falls for a woman suspected of murdering her aunt, so he covers up evidence that may incriminate her as he attempts to get her acquitted. Film noir, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Wendell Corey

programme.title: Winchester '73 (1950)
programme.desc: A gunslinger tracks down his father's killer, but is unable to exact his revenge because the sheriff of the town makes a point of confiscating all firearms. Instead he challenges him to compete in a shooting competition to win a superb rifle, but when the murderer loses, he steals the coveted prize. Western, starring James Stewart, Shelley Winters, Dan Duryea and Stephen McNally

programme.title: A Beautiful Mind (2001)
programme.desc: Biopic of the brilliant American mathematician John Nash, whose prospects of a promising career with the CIA were confounded by paranoid delusions and schizophrenia as the stress of the job proved too much of a burden. Drama, starring Russell Crowe, Jennifer Connelly, Ed Harris, Judd Hirsch, Paul Bettany and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: Hidden Figures (2016)
programme.desc: As the space race reaches fever pitch in the early 1960s, a trio of female African-American mathematicians attempt to overcome prejudice and find work with NASA. Their remarkable skills prove vital in getting an astronaut into orbit and bringing him safely back to Earth, but to realise their potential they must overcome deep-seated prejudice in the space programme and society as a whole. Fact-based drama, starring Taraji P Henson, Octavia Spencer, Janelle Monae and Kevin Costner

programme.title: St. Agatha (2018)
programme.desc: In 1950s Georgia, Agatha, a pregnant young con woman on the run, seeks refuge in a seemingly perfect convent. However, Agatha soon realises she is trapped in a place filled with dark secrets and evil inhabitants. Horror directed by Darren Lynn Bousman, veteran of the Saw movies, starring Sabrina Kern and Carolyn Hennesy

programme.title: Videoman (2018)
programme.desc: Ennio Midena used to own Sweden's greatest VHS store, but now he's a washed up alcoholic. When he is offered 10,000 euros for a rare videotape, it seems like his luck is about to change. However, when he discovers the tape has been stolen, Midena will stop at nothing to get it back. Comedy thriller, starring Stefan Sauk and Lena Nilsson. In Swedish and English

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: The Court-Martial of Billy Mitchell (1955)
programme.desc: In the 1920s, an American colonel accuses the war department of criminal negligence for denying the air force the funding it needs - but the powers-that-be still regard aircraft as an irrelevant part of the military, and respond by putting him on trial. Courtroom drama, starring Gary Cooper and Rod Steiger, with Ralph Bellamy and Elizabeth Montgomery

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Too Much (1956)
programme.desc: An American couple on holiday in Morocco witness the killing of a local man they have befriended. Before dying he whispers a secret that has serious political implications - but they are prevented from telling the police when their son is kidnapped by a gang of spies bent on keeping them silent. Alfred Hitchcock's remake of his own 1934 thriller, with James Stewart, Doris Day, Bernard Miles and Daniel Gelin. Featuring Day's performance of Oscar-winning song Whatever Will Be, Will Be (Que Sera, Sera)

programme.title: Romancing the Stone (1984)
programme.desc: A romantic novelist goes in search of her kidnapped sister in the steamy jungles of South America, only to become the target of a villainous general who demands as a ransom the valuable treasure map in her possession. Help is at hand in the form of a craggy daredevil fortune hunter, who has his eye on a share of the profits. Comedy adventure, starring Michael Douglas, Kathleen Turner and Danny DeVito

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed

programme.title: The Secret of Marrowbone (2017)
programme.desc: A young man and his three siblings have kept the death of their beloved mother secret in order to remain together. However, they are plagued by a sinister presence in their sprawling manor. Writer/director Sergio G Sanchez's horror, starring George MacKay, Anya Taylor-Joy and Charlie Heaton

programme.title: Mother! (2017)
programme.desc: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their peaceful existence. Drama, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Javier Bardem, Ed Harris and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.desc: A Christmas Eve catnapping renews Salem's love for his family, and Uncle Monty shares holiday cheer with a talking newt and a contortionist

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily and Marshall are disappointed to discover Ted is meeting his former college girlfriend, who they find pretentious, while Barney plays a prank on his friends, causing embarrassment for the gang. Guest starring Laura Prepon (That '70s Show), with Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Karen breaks up with Ted, who later discovers that Lily deliberately sabotaged their relationship by making it appear that he had been unfaithful - and has also interfered in his previous relationships. Meanwhile, Barney and Marshall discuss the merits of pyjamas. Guest starring Laura Prepon (That '70s Show)

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: The DiMeos go on an impromptu family road trip, but Ray has something in store that angers Maya. Dylan grows anxious after visiting a fortune teller

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: To get on the good side of their health insurance agent and obtain the replacement wheelchair JJ needs, the DiMeos ask Dylan to make a big sacrifice at her athletics meeting

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isn't long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is thrilled that he gets to celebrate Christmas now that he is engaged to Lainey. Meanwhile, Murray's brother Marvin makes a promise to Adam with a surprising outcome

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is in her element as she prepares for Barry and Lainey's wedding. Geoff worries about Adam's shortcomings as a wedding videographer, while Barry begins to have second thoughts about the whole thing

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt's mother seeks support from the precinct when her house is burgled. Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom. Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases. Boyle, Jeffords and Gina attempt to resolve a petty conflict between Scully and Hitchcock, while Holt loses Santiago's favourite pen. Guest starring Gina Gershon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to teach a course at the university, and Howard surprises the gang when he decides to enrol on it. Meanwhile, Amy plays Penny and Bernadette off against each other while the tension brews over Penny's new job. Comedy, guest starring Regina King (Southland), with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny attempt to prove Sheldon wrong when he claims that he and Amy have a superior relationship. Meanwhile, Howard is nervous when Nasa asks him to throw the first pitch at a baseball game honouring National Space Day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD accidentally scratches himself with a used syringe and fears he may catch hepatitis B, prompting him to avoid his most vulnerable patients. Comedy, guest starring Brendan Fraser, with Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jordan's brother Ben is admitted to the hospital suffering from a minor injury, but JD later faces the difficult task of telling him he also has leukaemia. Meanwhile, Elliot mistakenly tells a patient she is pregnant. Guest starring Brendan Fraser

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: It is prom night and all three of the DiMeo kids are going, which leaves Maya and Jimmy with a rare night to themselves, while Ray thinks he is finally about to have his first kiss

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: With the school year over, Maya is excited to spend the summer with JJ, but he and Kenneth have made other plans. Jimmy gets special treatment at the most unlikely of places

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago try to get their parents to bond over Thanksgiving dinner, but their first holiday together as a family doesn't go well. Meanwhile, at the precinct, Captain Holt and Kevin's special Thanksgiving pie is stolen from Holt's office, so he hunts through the ranks for a possible culprit. Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero, with guest appearances from Jimmy Smits and Katey Sagal

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords' favourite author, DC Parlov, gets in touch after his latest manuscript is stolen, so Jeffords and Peralta convince Diaz to go undercover with them at a fantasy fiction convention to find the culprit. Back at the precinct, Holt, Santiago and Boyle take a forensics course, but Boyle's big mouth gets him in trouble

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dropouts are over the moon when they are booked to perform a gig at a charity carnival, and Adam takes the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Meanwhile, Beverly's concerns about Murray's health push him to the limit

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj endures an anxious day as he worries that a space probe he helped design will not function properly, while Leonard and Sheldon agree to go clothes shopping with Penny and Amy. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon becomes concerned that his comfortable lifestyle is having an impact on his professional progress and is stopping him from achieving scientific greatness, so he asks the gang to make life more difficult for him. programme.desc: A telekinetic girl seeks Angel's help to master her powers, but the vampire struggles to understand why he is having trouble containing his monstrous urges, little aware that he is being slowly poisoned by a daytime visitor. Drama, starring David Boreanaz

programme.desc: Raj accepts Sheldon's offer to work for him as he is desperate to avoid being sent back to India. Howard starts spending more time with Leonard and Penny, who would rather be left alone. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is given the chance to square off against the one actor from the Star Trek franchise he holds a grudge against - Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Leonard asks Penny to set Howard up on a date with one of her friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Speechless

Meanwhile, JJ protects Dylan from a boy she's interested in, and the family band together to pull an all-nighter to finish Ray's science project

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: Maya tries to give Jimmy a Valentine's Day gift, with the help of his old room-mate - who is also her ex-fiance. Ray is overjoyed to find out he has a secret admirer, and JJ is charged with distributing Valentine's Day sweets at school

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises he's neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.desc: Raj's girlfriend Emily (Laura Spencer) gives Penny the cold shoulder when she learns about his past. Meanwhile, the guys debate investing in Stuart's comic-book shop and becoming part owners of the business. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is forced to revise for a work assessment during the girls' trip to Las Vegas, and Amy and Bernadette accuse her of spoiling their fun.
