programme.desc: Part two of two. Ben's doctors suggest different methods of treatment to tackle his leukaemia, while JD finds his professional judgement wavering at the thought of operating on a friend. Meanwhile, Elliot and Turk both feel their talents are not appreciated. Comedy, guest starring Brendan Fraser

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Just as the interns are finally about to become fully qualified doctors, a visit from Jordan has repercussions for them all. Comedy, starring Christa Miller Lawrence, Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: As the family prepares for their flight to JJ's summer camp, Maya gets a shock at the airport. Ray sees the summer holiday as an opportunity to reinvent himself, while Jimmy and Dylan turn the trip to camp into a father-daughter bonding moment

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: While JJ's at summer camp, Maya decides that the family can no longer use his disability as an excuse to let their own lives fall through the cracks. Maya, Jimmy and Dylan make dramatic changes, but Ray decides he'd rather watch his family's attempts than make any of his own. When JJ comes home, Dylan finds a love note in JJ's luggage from Alexa, a girl he met at camp, who wants to give JJ his first kiss

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While the squad attends a funeral in Los Angeles, Captain Holt learns that he is in the running for his dream job: Commissioner of the NYPD. however, after they miss their return flight to New York, Peralta must find a way to get Holt back in time for his interview. Santiago tries to convince everyone that she can be laid back, Jeffords panics about losing his first-class flight, and Boyle pries into Diaz's personal life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz begs Peralta to help her break some big news to her parents, but her plan is thrown off track when Mr and Mrs Diaz wrongly assume that their daughter and her colleague are dating. The squad suffers internet problems after the Cyber Crimes Unit move into the office downstairs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Adam decides to see the movie Willow instead of spending Mother's Day with Beverly, he must find a way to get back into her good graces. Barry is tired of his status as middle child and fights Erica for his right to the college of his choice

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam unintentionally lets it slip that Barry never completed his community service requirement. Erica makes plans for her and Geoff to follow The Grateful Dead all summer, while Barry and his friends graduate from high school.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon are forced to defend themselves against criticism from an online bully after publishing a physics paper. Meanwhile, the girls confront embarrassing moments from their pasts during a night in. Comedy, guest starring Stephen Hawking, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, guest starring Nathan Fillion, with Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy and Xander are concerned that Willow has never met her new internet boyfriend face to face. Their fears prove all too valid, as he is a demon that feeds on human devotion and has become trapped in the school's computer network. Giles is forced to swallow his hatred of technology and seek the aid of the computer science teacher - only to find she knows a thing or two about magic

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Unquiet sleep causes Angel to dream of 1860 London, and the moment he made the clairvoyant nun Drusilla into a vampire. With the memories of his monstrous past still fresh, the sleuth encounters Darla, causing Cordelia, Wesley and Gunn to fear he may revert to his evil ways

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Ted sets up an architecture company in his apartment - but progress is hampered by the stationery order taking priority over his clients. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted's friends urge him to wait three days before calling a girl he likes to ask her on a date, but he insists on sending text messages - only to find, after some apparent initial success, that Barney is the person receiving them. American sitcom, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.desc: JJ gets into an argument with Kenneth over the amount of time they spend together, so Dylan decides she must 'parent-trap' them both so they can get along well again. When the family starts sneaking into a country club, Ray sees it as an opportunity to live the high life, but Maya jumps at the chance to spend more mother-and-son time

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik (Blossom) makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems

programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoff's father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentine's Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. Peralta and Diaz adjust to life behind bars, but while Jake is forced to join a prison gang led by notorious inmate Romero, Rosa puts Captain Holt and Sgt Jeffords to the test by making outrageous lists of chores for her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. When the warden tells Peralta to investigate Romero's drug smuggling operation, Peralta finds himself trapped by divided loyalties. Meanwhile, Santiago is offered a deal by a local mobster who claims he can prove Lt Hawkins is guilty of the crimes that Diaz and Peralta were jailed for, but Holt and the team think they have found a safer plan. Tim Meadows, Lou Diamond Phillips and Gina Gershon guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny ask Howard and Bernadette for advice when they argue about money. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj try to find out whether they could survive a dark matter research expedition in a salt mine by attempting to simulate the conditions in a steam tunnel beneath the university. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is left in a difficult professional situation when a doctor (guest star Billy Bob Thornton) turns up at her door following her flirtatious sales technique, so the guys try to help her out. Meanwhile, Amy and Bernadette have a dispute over whether female scientists should flaunt their sexuality to try to get ahead at work. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: Relationships between the Sacred Heart Hospital staff continue to suffer in the wake of Jordan's revelations, and Carla gives Turk the elbow, forcing him to stay with JD - who is desperately trying to get back into Dr Cox's good books. Guest starring Colin Hay, with Zach Braff, Donald Faison and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD, Turk and Elliot spend their first unsupervised night on the ward as resident physicians, a car chase ends at the hospital, and Dr Cox faces up to the feelings he has for his ex-wife. Comedy, starring Zach Braff, Donald Faison and Sarah Chalke

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When some new students with disabilities start at Lafayette High School, Maya encourages their parents to demand full-time aides like Kenneth. However, the school administrators tell her that anything the new students get will be taken out of JJ's budget. Dylan starts to play truant because she is unused to returning to the same school for two years in a row, while JJ pushes Kenneth towards a romance with his teacher

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

During a visit to a local vineyard, sparks fly between Mike Hepker and Tash Thorne, who runs The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport with her partner Mike Pearce. Having only just opened, Pauline has a house full for the very first time. The narrow antique beds cause concerns and Jenny and Clive Aylett from Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk are first to criticise breakfast. When it comes to feedback, Pauline's left deflated by her sausage scores - and Karen and Mike Hepker vote with their feet

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, run by publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne. A boat tour backfires when Jenny struggles with her water phobia and at dinner Karen takes the opportunity to tell the others exactly what she thinks of them. But things really kick off when it comes to feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wharfe House hosts Pauline Cox and Claire Smith begin a bitter debate, demanding to know why their beds caused such a sleepless night. Accusations subsequently fly in all directions and walk-outs look on the cards as tensions mount leading to the payments being revealed

programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Black rhino Kitani is due to give birth at Chester Zoo and help swell the ranks of this endangered species, but, having lost three previous calves, it is a worrying time and the keepers are concerned that things aren't going to plan. The zoo also has four rare new arrivals called tenrecs, mysterious mammals from Madagascar and, with so little known about them, the keepers try everything they can to help them breed, while red river hog Mali has given birth to twins, but tearaway dad Confetti is a threat to his own babies

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau

After a sumptuous breakfast, the cars are on their way, and Dick, Angel, Arthur and Dorothy can focus on a retro vehicle of their own, the 1980s Asquith bus. With Angel's unique design, and Dick's engineering, it soon becomes the camper van the family dreamed of

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia

programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Jim and Simone Fairfull, who are planning a light-filled glass pavilion projecting over a private loch. programme.title: The Kennedys: Tragedy & Triumph
programme.desc: John F Kennedy is sworn-in as the youngest American president ever elected, and his wife Jackie invites the cameras in to witness her transformation of the White House, but the his first year in office is marked by crisis both at home and abroad, and the young President leans heavily on his family for support

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Cameras follow Thames Valley Police's investigation into the murder of 64-year-old Hang Yin Leung, who died after being violently assaulted during a burglary at her Milton Keynes home in January 2017. Filmed over 12 months, the programme interweaves the police's enquiries with an intimate portrait of a British-Chinese family coming to terms with the impact of murder, with the story of migrants from Hong Kong who came to the UK in search of a better life for their son unfolding alongside the hunt for the killers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Presenters Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are challenged to build a bridge over the River Kwai in Thailand. In order to do that, however, they have to drive across Burma, a country that has been largely closed to Westerners for more than 40 years, and must make the trip in three lorries, each bought sight unseen from the internet on a limited budget. What follows is an epic journey of beautiful scenery, regular adversity, ongoing malfunction and the constant bickering of the three men

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May visit Africa on a mission to find the definitive source of the Nile, the world's longest river, which spans more than 4,000 miles. The trio believe they can do a better job than explorers who claim to have discovered the waterway's starting point by travelling further and faster than previous efforts - but the only tools at their disposal are determination, ingenuity and three ageing estate cars

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu takes his food truck to Croydon to meet with Jimmy Carr and cook his ultimate meal ready for when he steps off stage

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Offbeat tourism show in which Richard Ayoade is joined by celebrity guests to enjoy the most efficient weekend break possible. He begins in Barcelona with comedienne and actress Kathy Burke, experiencing the best of this popular holiday destination in just 48 hours. The pair sample adventurous cuisine, including potatoes coated in edible clay, and a cava tasting session quickly descends into disarray. Other highlights include a visit to the Barcelona Football Club museum, a guided tricycle tour, and a trip to see the surrealist work of Catalan artist Joan Miro

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Four famous faces go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of entertaining trivia-based games across the week, with comedians Nish Kumar and Al Murray, Radio 1 DJ Clara Amfo and broadcaster Anneka Rice the first contestants. A daily winner is declared following a quick-fire round at the end of each show, and the weekly scores are tallied resulting in an overall champion being crowned on Friday, when the victor chooses between a House of Games dartboard and a branded dressing gown

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captain David Mitchell is joined by TV presenter Gabby Logan and comedian Andy Hamilton, while his counterpart Lee Mack welcomes Dr Christian Jessen and EastEnder Diane Parish. Host Rob Brydon oversees proceedings on the comedy panel show as the contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts a festive edition of the panel game, joined by regular panellist Alan Davies and guests Johnny Vegas, Sara Pascoe and Josh Widdicombe. programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by fellow comedian Adam Hills on a whirlwind weekend in Turkey's largest city. He wants to show The Last Leg host how to holiday with ruthless efficiency, as they cross the River Bosphorus from Europe to Asia, comparing a private yacht tour with the low-price public ferry. The pair have an authentic Turkish shave at a local barbershop that turns out to be a lot closer than they were expecting, and share an awkward moment at a local bath and massage parlour. There's also a visit to the Grand Bazaar market, where both men have a go at haggling

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May head to Norway to find out how a selection of cars fare when taking part in Winter Olympic events. programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade takes actress and writer Jessica Hynes on a whirlwind weekend away to Iceland, a country famous for spectacular water features, geo-thermic pools and a curious belief in elves - all attributes that the pair investigate with ruthless efficiency. They go on the popular Golden Circle Tour of the Nordic island's most famous waterfalls, glaciers and geysers - by helicopter, saving seven valuable hours. They also eat rotten shark and Brenavin, a spirit made from mashed potato, and attend elf school, followed by a speedy boat trip in search of whales. There's also a rapid chill-out at the Blue Lagoon geothermic pool and spa

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Three Gorges Dam, built across China's Yangtze river, which is the largest and heaviest concrete structure ever built, housing the world's largest power station

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Millau Viaduct in South West France, which is the tallest bridge in the world and stretches two and a half kilometres over one of Europe's deepest valleys

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston tells the story of Hitler's state executioner, who was placed in charge of killing thousands of people declared enemies of the state

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An abandoned prison beneath the water, a tunnel in the heart of a mountain, concrete towers hidden in the woods and a rusting coastal relic

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores an Edwardian utopia in Letchworth, where he meets a fourth generation citizen who introduces him to the town's community spirit. He then heads towards London, and discovers a favoured haunt of King Edward VII, before sampling the monarch's favourite tipple, the King's Ginger

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo arrives in Croydon, where he hears the story of a mixed-race composer who was once celebrated but is now forgotten. At the Three Bridges station, he is delighted to find a recently built depot and its fleet of new Class 700 trains - and is given the great honour of washing one down. In Lewes, he makes a beeline for Charleston, the home of artists Vanessa Bell and Duncan Grant, and in Shoreham-by-Sea, Michael discovers how magnificent Edwardians in flying machines took off from the oldest licensed airport in the country

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Bolsover Castle in Derbyshire. Finds on display include original illustrations for Roald Dahl's book Fantastic Mr Fox, a set of motorcyclist Barry Sheene's racing leathers, a collection of Star Wars toys, a mysterious metal rod that proves to be far more valuable than it appears and a miniature house used for training plumbers. A visitor to the show tries to find a glass figure for her mother, to replace one that exploded

programme.title: Restoration Workshop
programme.desc: Gary Wallis visits a grand Victorian school where he's given access to huge cellars full of old treasures. Using what he finds, he creates two formidable pieces of furniture

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The US Navy's fastest combat ships, which are capable of a turn of speed only possible due to a revolutionary water propulsion system and the chance discovery of a brand new alloy

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Concrete channels hidden in a mountaintop forest, a collapsing bridge, a marooned military base and the upright rusting carcass of ship

programme.title: Secrets of the Third Reich
programme.desc: Part two of two. A look at Nazi experiments into atomic weapons, examining how close they got to developing a functioning nuclear device before the end of the war

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles, a liquid oxygen factory and two launch pads

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo heads to Chichester, West Sussex, where he encounters an Edwardian motoring duo patronised by King Edward VII. After a grand tour of their factory, he is treated to some rest and relaxation in one of their finest vehicles. Arriving in the resort of Southsea, Hampshire, Michael heads for the King's Theatre, where he treads the boards in a community production of Lads in the Village. Crossing the Solent, the presenter boards the Island Line to travel along the pier in a 1930s London Underground carriage, then hops on to the Isle of Wight heritage line bound for Wootton

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Dorset, Michael Portillo visits Brownsea Island, where Robert Baden Powell began the scout movement in the early 20th century. Joining a group of present scouts, the presenter learns to build a bivouac and finds out what it is about scouting that still appeals to boys - and girls - today. In the New Forest, Michael searches out some unsung heroes of the First World War - the ponies who became war horses - and hears their story from a commoner who runs a stable and riding school. Then in Bournemouth, the one-time MP investigates a very British institution - the beach hut

programme.title: Inside Central Station
programme.desc: Storm Hector causes havoc on the tracks, Sajid completes his last shift before he retires after 45 years in the station, and Beyonce and Jay-Z are in town

programme.title: Steam Train Britain
programme.desc: Meeting the Welsh Highland Railway's oldest volunteer fireman, 80-year-old Cedric Lodge, who has worked on the railways for 60 years. In Devon, there is a look at the Autotrain

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn explores St Pancras station in London and its sister hotel - built to show off the might of the Midlands, and learns about Castle Howard station in North Yorkshire

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: New World and Tina Charles perform on the vintage comedy and variety show

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage comedy sketches, including Wedding Service and Done to Death. With guests Diane Keen and Sue Lloyd, and music by Georgie Fame and Alan Price

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second of two episodes from Bolsover Castle in Derbyshire. Shows they are appraising include Simply Nigella, Five Guys a Week, The Andrew Marr Show interview with Michael Gove, Family Fortunes, Scream, The Million Pound Cube, Emily's Story: Stand Up to Cancer, and news coverage of Manchester mayor Andy Burnham's skirmish with the Government

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland in the words-and-numbers quiz. Nick Helm joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: President Trump: Tweets from the White House
programme.desc: Donald Trump has tweeted tens of thousands of times since becoming US president, giving the American people unique access to his innermost, unedited thoughts, and giving him access to his base without the interference of the traditional media. This programme looks at the impact on US politics of his use of Twitter, and whether they have caused problems and controversies, or, seemingly, solved intractable foreign policy problems

programme.title: Guy Martin's Best Bits
programme.desc: The presenter remembers some of the most memorable adventures he has had in his beloved transit van. Guy salvaged the supposedly written-off vehicle after a collision with a car transporter, and transformed it with the aid of custom engineers. He has entered it in the Nevada Open Road Challenge, tested it to its limits on Bonneville Salt Flats, and broken a world record at the Nurburgring in Germany

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke gets to work on a 300-year-old house in Broadstairs, which was once a school and a retirement community, leaving it with a few quirky features - not least a row of three toilets. For inspiration, he visits the Royal Pavilion in Brighton. He also helps a couple make the most of the tiny living room in their 1930s south London bungalow

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. In the second episode, Jimmy and the team deal with the arrival of 6000 Christmas turkeys. With the help of modern technology, Jimmy discovers what wild animals have been living in his woodlands. Plus, a wallaby is in urgent need of medical attention

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present the halfway point of the culinary contest, with pastry week. The bakers must put their own stamp on a Cornish classic and are set a retro technical challenge. For the showstopper round, they must concoct a classic tart in a pastry cage, before judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood decide who will be this week's star baker and who will be going home

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Canal boat stewardess Denise Hendon hosts the first dinner party in Birmingham. Despite admitting her cookery skills could be better, she hopes her night of Moroccan-themed revelry will be a success, but the guests are underwhelmed by her menu. While party girl Angela McFarlane dreads eating the couscous, suave Frenchman Jean-Benoit Burloux longs for a glass of fine wine to wash the meal down

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Daniela Lawler throws the second party in Birmingham, hoping to impress her guests by inviting them to the Georgian country house she shares with her husband, DJ Steve Lawler. The hostess aims high by planning a four-course Italian-inspired meal, and everything seems to be going well, until she realises her lobster is too big to fit in her pans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Office administrator Angela McFarlane hosts the third dinner party in Birmingham, and hopes to impress with a starter of chicken and spring onion terrine with red onion marmalade. However, the guests seem more interested in rummaging through her bedroom drawers

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Electrician Elliot Jauncey hosts the penultimate dinner party in Birmingham, and despite a lack of experience, plans a top-class menu featuring two desserts. He also books a local band to serenade his guests, but the evening turns out to be far more difficult than he had expected

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jean-Benoit Burloux hosts the final dinner party in Birmingham, and plans a four-course menu including crab in a bird's nest, a blade of beef and a pavlova with raspberries. However, the cook has to find a way of overcoming Denise's fussy eating habits before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children flying the nest, Andy and Alida have decided now is the time to fulfil their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. They are downsizing their house in Wokingham, Surrey, and splitting the funds between the UK and France, so Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin have been sent on a joint mission. With a total of £650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Surinder Bedi and her son Narinder find a holiday home for the whole family in the Murcia region on Spain's Mediterranean coast. With a cash budget of £70,000, Laura shows them a selection of property contenders that offer good value, but will they go for an apartment by the beach or a villa with a pool?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers enjoy the great outdoors at Eden Valley Glamping in Cumbria, a site with a back-to-basics approach - but a dusty bathroom and damp duvets put a crimp in the guests' stay

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Mair and Dafydd, strangers in the Welsh town of Neath who have never owned a home before, are given a lump sum to buy a property, then renovate and sell it

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra suffers from PMT, so Ray decides to help alleviate her symptoms - but only succeeds in making matters worse. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert returns to work after sick leave, but is soon driven to the conclusion that he does not have the nerve to be a policeman any more and decides to pursue a safer career in telemarketing

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Rod and Margaret from London search for a house in Dorset and a holiday home in Dordogne in France, with enough space for their six grandchildren to come and visit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Newcomers GB Para Powerlifter Ross and wellness coach Susie must make a dramatic decision about which of their teammates loses their place in camp. With one less person in the team, tempers fray and the bridge build falls even further behind schedule. A flare brings the promise of a luxury banquet, but with it the cost of an essential day of building, which causes a major rift

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host the show's first ever Japanese week. For the signature challenge the bakers tackle a Japanese version of the Asian staple, steamed buns, while the technical round involves a tricky recipe involving multiple layers. The showstopper round is themed around kawaii - the Japanese love of all things cute

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: An edition focusing on the behaviour of teenage boys, with frontline staff in Northamptonshire and across the country saying they are becoming more violent. PC Kathleen Roberts responds to a suspected acid attack carried out by a teenager in Northampton, while Sgt Martin Waller is dispatched to the scene of a suspected gang-related stabbing

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Two strangers with building experience and plenty of enthusiasm buy a bungalow at auction in the market town of Glossop, and work to give this tired house a new lease of life

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists piece together the story behind the discovery of 13 bodies with the skulls cut open in a 19th-century Bristol graveyard. The investigation uncovers a link to a local hospital, a celebrated surgeon, and the crime of bodysnatching

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first dinner party in Bristol is hosted by theatre-lover Richard Hope-Hawkins, whose eclectic menu divides the guests even before they arrive. Teacher Laura Ford is impressed by the sound of home-made pate, and food writer Darryl Bullock is intrigued by the Rod Steiger gunge cake. However, vegetarian Zoe Kellaway is not looking forward to her alternative starter of red and green pepper mousse, while stonemason Andy Wright thinks the dishes have a feminine touch

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Primary school teacher Laura Ford hosts the second dinner in Bristol, and prides herself on throwing a highly organised party, meticulously planning every detail of the event. Her menu features a starter of prawn, chorizo and butternut squash salad, followed by a Balinese curry, and a trio of desserts

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third dinner party in Bristol is hosted by food critic Darryl Bullock. A self-confessed animal lover, he hopes his pork belly roast will impress, but does not count on his pets leaving an unpleasant surprise for two of the guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Botox fan Zoe Kellaway hosts a 'pretty in pink' dinner party for the penultimate evening in Bristol. She hopes to cheer up the group by cooking a predominantly pink menu, which features beetroot risotto, and enlists the help of a butler in hot pants to serve cocktails

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stonemason Andy Wright hosts the final dinner party in Bristol, confident the black-tie theme and his impressive Victorian flat will win him the £1,000 prize. He delivers an evening of champagne, caviar and canapes, but things take a turn for the worse when he burns the nut roast and loses a key ingredient for the dessert

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton and Jasmine Harman help Bob and Judith choose between the rugged coastline of northern Norfolk and the sunny beaches of the Costa Blanca on a budget of £230,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Fernie Castle in Letham, Fife, where owners Neil and Mary Blackburn hope to impress their guests with their traditional 15th century B&B

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Nicole and Karl meet first the first time as they step into the auction room to buy a terraced house in Oldbury. Presented by Simon O'Brien

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert bumps into his ex-wife, and considers rekindling the relationship. Meanwhile, Frank tells Amy the story of how the pair split up in the first place

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Marie surprises everyone by arranging a trip to Rome for the whole family, but all Ray can do is complain. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the conclusion of Gordon Ramsay's visit to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, he confronts sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum, and finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the Italian restaurant's failings

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Sonal and Tina can't wait to give up their busy lives in Birmingham and move to the seaside. Looking for a new permanent home on the stunning Gower Peninsula in Wales and also a holiday bolt-hole on the Greek island of Corfu, they call upon the joint talents of Jonnie Irwin and Laura Hamilton to deliver the double dream. Rising to the challenge, with £385,000 to play with, Jonnie has three great properties to show them in the UK, and for her £150,000 budget Laura has three options up her sleeve in Corfu, but will the couple love any of them enough to put in an offer?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Alex Horne sets more tricky, puzzling and downright idiotic challenges for the celebrities, before Greg Davies decides who deserves the most points. Highlights include Johnny Vegas yelling from a tall chair, Katherine Parkinson forgetting how balloons work and Richard Herring flailing about in a dinghy. It remains to be seen what Daisy May Cooper and Mawaan Rizan will be doing - but it's unlikely to be dignified

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Harriet Kemsley take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland in the words-and-numbers quiz. Nick Helm joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back at a host of classic dates from the show, where eyes met, sparks flew, and love truly blossomed. Dapper gent Will is set up on a date with fellow tweed admirer Fran, while Bristol Rastafarian and single mother Ibiba meets fellow Bristolian Aarron. Elsewhere, Octogenarian Doreen meets 86-year-old author James, who is more than ready to write the next chapter of his love life

programme.title: Married at First Sight
programme.desc: The couples are brought together for a special retreat as they wrestle with the big decision - whether they should give their new marriages a chance or get divorced. Owen and Michelle have a make-or-break decision over how to deal with the dilemma of living 250 miles apart, while David and Shareen grapple with finding common ground

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Newcomers GB Para Powerlifter Ross and wellness coach Susie must make a dramatic decision about which of their teammates loses their place in camp. programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George meets Matt and Kevin, whose 1930s home stands out for all the wrong reasons. Sitting alongside the elegant Victorian and Edwardian properties in south-west London, this three-up, three-down is ugly from the outside and even worse on the inside, with dark, dated and badly designed spaces. Architects Katerina Dionysopoulou and Billy Mavropoulos are brought in to make most radical transformation on the programme to date - but will their wildly ambitious poured-concrete extension prove too innovative for the owners?

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home

programme.desc: Karen meets her best frenemy Beverley Leslie, who has a profound secret to tell. Meanwhile, Jack becomes a 'thousand-aire' thanks to a scratch card

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen's secret best friend Rosario suffers a heart attack, and as the whole gang rush to the hospital to support Karen, they learn that her beloved maid has died. Karen shuts down cold, refusing to grieve, so the rest all try to help however they can. Minnie Driver guest stars, alongside Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Encouraged by Jack to break out of their domestic laziness, the duo decide take a bread-making course. The teacher apparently believes that making loaves and making love are the same thing, giving both flatmates his number. Soon the seductive chef is carrying on affairs with both Will and Grace under the same roof - though neither is any the wiser of the other's interest. Meanwhile, Jack and Karen pick up an earworm - an infuriatingly catchy jingle from a commercial. Nick Offerman - Megan Mullally's real-life husband - guest stars, with regulars Mullally, Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part one of two. Michael is dragged away from his beloved TV game show to take the family for a meal at a Japanese restaurant - despite his hatred of eating out

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. Michael endures a disastrous evening at a Japanese restaurant, but consoles himself with the thought that he will eventually be able to watch the game he recorded before setting off. Unfortunately, he arrives home to find the butler has taped over it

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Catching up with tenants and landlords from previous episodes, including a man living in a damp and mouldy flat, who was unable to sleep in the bedroom due to the horrendous conditions. The programme also revisits a 70-year-old landlady whose tenants stopped paying the rent for a year, and the council's Rogue Landlord Team in Lewisham, who learned where a slum property owner's reputation for a short fuse came from

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A woman owes five months' rent, but refuses to leave unless the bailiffs arrive, while a man wanted to sell his house post-breakup, but the tenants are still there five years later. Plus, a man happily living in his garden shed

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Members of Essex's high-speed police interception unit pursue a stolen BMW X5, and the Stanway team gives two unsuspecting car thieves an early morning wake-up call. Elsewhere, officers discover a vehicle that has been turned into a four-wheeled petrol bomb, and a road-tax evader encounters trouble with the law

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team drops everything to pursue a criminal driving a stolen 4x4, and the Stanway officers cautiously close in on a man wielding a machete in a public park. Meanwhile, the chief inspector unveils the latest weapon in the interceptors' arsenal

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned is brought back to the place he was tortured, while Levi and Yashvi find some worrying and seemingly irrefutable proof against Ned as they search for his car

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Bella decides to confront Colby at his own game, while Owen spends a night with Alf and Marilyn to get acquainted

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: North West claimants struggling against medical and psychological issues while getting by on benefits. Blackpool martial arts enthusiast Mark hopes to get back into paid employment after being dismissed for breaking a colleague's nose, while Liverpool couple Clive and Sheila want to tie the knot on a benefits budget. Autistic Fleetwood man William struggles to get round due to a bad back and varicose veins. He needs a mobility scooter but has benefits have been cut

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: The programme follows Graham, a pest controller who battles critters, bugs and vermin across the Costa del Sol, as he goes on a snake hunt and is called to an ant infestation. Plus, a pair of Welsh ex-pats who moved to Spain to run a bar, and the so-called 'cat lady of the Costa del Sol', who feeds more than 100 street cats as well as taking them to the vets to be neutered

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: In Solihull, cleaners Richard and Brennan help IT workers Divya and Kaushal, who just do not know how to clean. Over three days they help transform their home

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: The security personnel at Coventry's West Orchards shopping centre receive a tip-off from Birmingham that an organised criminal gang is heading their way. In Weston Favell shopping centre in Northamptonshire, security guards are under pressure when a special event brings in extra shoppers, but an elusive serial shoplifter is apprehended stealing a trolley full of goods before disappearing amongst the crowds

programme.title: Drunk Tank Hangover
programme.desc: Cameras inside a Liverpool-based alcohol recovery bus focus on the inebriated during the four biggest party weekends of the year

programme.title: Harlan Coben's Safe
programme.desc: The life of a recent widower is thrown into fresh turmoil when one of his children goes missing after heading to a party. Thriller, starring Michael C Hall

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Lucious competes in a high stakes poker game in the hope of making connections with a fast-rising rapper, while Cookie holds auditions to find the next big star

Meanwhile, in his latest attempt to find a career, Jack takes a job as a Lyft driver. However, on his first run, he knocks over unhinged neighbour Val in the road. programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Will's ex-boyfriend Vince invites him to his wedding, Grace is impressed at Will's maturity in accepting. Meanwhile, Jack fends off the advances of an amorous cop and Karen plays a high-society treasure hunt. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack celebrates his one-month-aversary with cute cop Drew. The problem is, Drew is still married to Angela, but Jack has convinced her that he too is married - to Karen - so that they can continue to fool around behind her back. Meanwhile, Grace gets a spot on QVC trying to sell her bedsheets, though control freak Will immediately takes over, and the sheets hit the fan as their bickering is broadcast live on TV. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Claire wants to go on her first date with Tony, but Michael is reluctant to let her, so decides to spy on them in a bid to unmask the suitor as nothing more than a hormone-driven teenager

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Junior takes an IQ test that leaves his parents convinced he is a genius, although his impressive scores turn out to be a mistake. Kady makes career plans and starts exercising her authority round the house

programme.desc: A landlord seeks urgent advice from eviction specialist Chris after finding his three-bedroom terrace has been stripped bare of the fittings, the flooring, and even the grass on the lawn. Meanwhile, Steve and Ben face a dilemma in north London, where a tenant is being evicted for rent arrears, and in south London, Paul and Steve have no option but to force a dramatic entry into a property

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.desc: Petty officer Kyle Friedgen is accused of killing his ex-girlfriend, but while his case is dismissed due to a mishandled warrant, his life and reputation are marred by suspicion that he got away with murder. Determined to clear his name in full, Friedgen volunteers to be court-martialed, on the condition that the NCIS team conducts its own investigation. Meanwhile, Bishop and Jake discuss their marital problems. Naval crime drama, starring Emily Wickersham, with Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets

programme.title: The Last Days of Anne Boleyn
programme.desc: On Friday, May 19, 1536, Henry VIII's second wife Anne Boleyn became the first British queen to be executed, but the circumstances of her death remain shrouded in mystery and contradiction. Hilary Mantel, Philippa Gregory and David Starkey are among the leading authors and historians sifting through the evidence to determine why Henry had her killed

programme.title: Diana: Last Days of a Princess
programme.desc: Genevieve O'Reilly and Patrick Baladi star as Diana, Princess of Wales and Dodi Al Fayed in a docu-drama charting the couple's last days, culminating in the fatal crash in the Alma Tunnel, Paris. Including interviews with Mohamed Al Fayed, bodyguard Kez Wingfield and masseuse Myriah Daniels

programme.desc: Interviews with those involved in the 1980 Iranian Embassy Siege and footage of the dramatic SAS operation that brought it to an end

programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. However, he first has to pass his driving test to stand any chance of winning her heart - and in the process ends up in a wild car-chase after a gang of robbers. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baker, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash asks Susan to marry him as the team heads for the coast in preparation for D-Day

programme.title: Shakespeare Myth Maker
programme.desc: A look into Shakespeare's world and the myths surrounding his works

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old woman in denial about the poor state of her health becomes emotional when Shaw Somers reveals her cholesterol levels are dangerously high, and a 24-year-old seeks help in controlling her irritable bowel syndrome. Giovanni Miletto lends his expertise to a sports enthusiast who suffers from crippling premenstrual stress, and joins Lucy Jones to investigate whether a man's extreme raw food diet might be damaging his body

programme.title: A Royal Hangover
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the relationship between the British and alcohol, featuring a look back at the 16th and 17th centuries and an interview with Russell Brand

programme.title: The Returned (2013)
programme.desc: A young doctor goes on the run with her bitten boyfriend and their remaining supplies of a protein used to treat a zombie virus. Sci-fi horror, starring Emily Hampshire, Kris Holden-Ried and Shawn Doyle

programme.title: Silent Scream (1990)
programme.desc: A former soldier is sentenced to life in prison after murdering a bartender in 1960s Soho. During his incarceration, his violent behaviour gets more and more out of control, until prison doctors assign him an experimental treatment to help him come to terms with the roots of his rage. Prison drama, starring Iain Glen and Robert Carlyle

programme.title: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Part one of two. An alcoholic detective pursues the infamous serial killer brutally murdering prostitutes in Victorian London. Many potential suspects present themselves, from an anti-royal demagogue to an actor whose stage portrayal of murderous evil is a little too convincing, but the inspector is convinced a conspiracy seeks to protect the ripper's identity. Thriller, with Michael Caine, Jane Seymour, Lewis Collins and Harry Andrews

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Former Guns N' Roses star Slash talks to Ronnie about his career in rock music and selects some of his favourite records, as well as discussing his lifelong enthusiasm for guitars

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: Ash asks Susan to marry him as the team heads for the coast in preparation for D-Day

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: It is the mating season, Pretty Wing and Golden Eye only have eyes for ganders and forget about their chores

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: During a flight in snowy country, Nils is getting very hungry. Gorgo offers to share some tasty worms but Nils is almost ill just looking at them

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Documentary that follows the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in zoos around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans.

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: A woman who is Kate's exact double goes missing in the Himalayas just before her engagement party, so Kate has to take her place while Kylie and Kim search for her

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The colour pink disappears from the world shortly before the band performs at an Indian festival, taking Kylie and Kate's energy and cheerfulness with it

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 47-year-old woman in denial about the poor state of her health becomes emotional when Shaw Somers reveals her cholesterol levels are dangerously high, and a 24-year-old seeks help in controlling her irritable bowel syndrome. Giovanni Miletto lends his expertise to a sports enthusiast who suffers from crippling premenstrual stress, and joins Lucy Jones to investigate whether a man's extreme raw food diet might be damaging his body

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Michael Mosley and the team are in Lancaster to find out how much air pollution a typical family breathes in and whether trees could be the answer to the problem. Chris van Tulleken explores the world of probiotics, Gabriel Weston examines a novel cure for migraines that was discovered by chance in a beauty clinic, and Saleyha Ahsan demonstrates how to revive a victim of drowning

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby

programme.title: Strongroom (1962)
programme.desc: Two people are locked in a bank vault during a robbery, but the crooks have a crisis of conscience and try to free them while avoiding the police. Crime drama, with Colin Gordon

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: Danger UXB
programme.desc: An injured Ash is rushed to hospital, his confidence shattered - but an emergency forces him to return to duty. Final episode of the Second World war drama

programme.title: How Mad Was King George?
programme.desc: Prince Charles is among those seeking to restore George III to his proper place in history, as diaries, letters and expert analysis paint a picture of a devoted family man, whose 60-year reign culminated in his receiving accolades as 'the father of the people', while scientists explode the myths surrounding his illness

programme.title: Royally Mad
programme.desc: American fans of the royal family take a trip round London in the run-up to Prince William and Kate Middleton's wedding

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The landmark series from the 1970s takes a look at the origins of jazz and challenges the theories that it is a black music form which was created in New Orleans. Featuring contributions and footage from Miles Davis, Duke Ellington, Charlie Mingus and Louis Armstrong

programme.title: Heyday TV
programme.desc: The leading members of the Kinks who were in the band from 1965 through to 1985 recall their time recording and touring

programme.title: London Live Film Festival
programme.desc: London Live shines a spotlight on some of London's best independent short films with this specially curated selection from filmmaker Michael Slowe

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: K-Shop (2016)
programme.desc: A Bournemouth takeaway owner despairs of his drunken, abusive customers and is finally pushed to the limit when his father is killed in a violent altercation. He begins murdering the people who make his life a misery, and disposes of the bodies by making them into kebabs. Horror, starring Reece Noi and Ewen MacIntosh

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Presenter Bernard O'Mahoney meets Danny Woollard and Angelo 'Festus' Hayman, who were involved in the infamous Snowhill robbery in 1995

programme.desc: Wycombe Wanderers v Watford (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Championship clash from Adams Park, as the Chairboys play host to the Hornets. These sides were separated by two divisions last season, and after experiencing respective promotion and relegation last term, find themselves competing at the same level for the first time since the 1997/98 campaign. The most recent encounter between these clubs was a Capital One Cup clash in August 2012, when Watford triumphed 1-0 after extra time

programme.title: Live MNF
programme.desc: Burnley v Tottenham Hotspur (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight clash from Turf Moor, where the Clarets play host to Spurs. The corresponding fixture last season was the final match each side contested before the season was put on hold because of the Covid-19 pandemic, and on that occasion the teams played out a 1-1 draw in front of 20,946 fans. Chris Wood had given the hosts a lead in the 13th minute, before a second-half penalty from Dele Alli ensured a share of the spoils

programme.title: Live EFL
programme.desc: Wycombe Wanderers v Watford (Kick-off 7.45pm). Coverage of the Championship clash from Adams Park, as the Chairboys play host to the Hornets. These sides were separated by two divisions last season, and after experiencing respective promotion and relegation last term, find themselves competing at the same level for the first time since the 1997/98 campaign. The most recent encounter between these clubs was a Capital One Cup clash in August 2012, when Watford triumphed 1-0 after extra time

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at Dallas Cowboys' 1993 Super Bowl triumph against Buffalo Bills at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. This match represented the first time in history that the same teams faced each other in the showpiece match in two consecutive years, while the Cowboys' 30-13 victory meant they tied the Pittsburgh Steelers and the San Francisco 49ers for most Super Bowl wins, as they claimed their fourth trophy

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Green Bay Packers' 1996 Super Bowl success over New England Patriots at the Superdome in New Orleans, Louisiana. This was the Packers' third overall win in the NFL's showpiece encounter, and their first since Super Bowl II under celebrated head coach Vince Lombardi, after whom the Super Bowl trophy is now named

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting St Louis Rams' 1999 Super Bowl victory over Tennessee Titans at the Georgia Dome in Atlanta, Georgia. The 23-16 victory represented the Rams' first triumph in the NFL's showpiece occasion, which was inspired by the performance of quarterback Kurt Warner, who threw for 414 yards and two touchdowns

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Denver Broncos' 1998 Super Bowl success over Atlanta Falcons at the Pro Player Stadium in Miami, Florida. Quarterback John Elway became the oldest player to be named Super Bowl MVP, as he led the Broncos to a 34-19 victory in the final game of his career

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of New England Patriots' 2004 Super Bowl success over Philadelphia Eagles at the Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, Florida. Victory ensured the Patriots became only the second team to win three Super Bowls in four years, all of which were won by a margin of three points
